sanskrit: त्रिभिर्गुणमयैर्भावैरेभिः सर्वमिदं जगत् । मोहितं नाभिजानाति मामेभ्यः परमव्ययम् ॥
hindiTranslation: किन्तु  इन तीनों गुणरूप भावोंसे मोहित यह सब जगत् इन गुणोंसे अतीत अविनाशी मुझे नहीं जानता ॥
englishTranslation: Deluded by these three qualities, the whole world does not know me, who am beyond them and imperishable.
essence: Three qualities can hide the imperishable reality from plain sight.
speaker: Krishna
